<!-- Describe the behavior you want. If you have a specific design in mind, share it. -->

<!-- Have you found a workaround? Is there a different approach that could also work? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else relevant: how often you hit this, what kind of projects you use Keen Agent on, etc. -->
